title: Dock Discipline Capstone
intendedTensionBeat: Three rescues compete, but the lower water-facing puppy and dock residue make the first priority clear.
intendedReleaseBeat: A planned dock triple during the pivot makes the final rescue sequence feel controlled.
expectedPath: Rescue the most water-threatened target first, cash a planned dock triple during the pivot, then finish the remaining two in a clean order.
expectedFailMode: Tempting broad clears overfill dock or delay the endangered puppy.
designNotes: Add a golden path with expected extraction order for the band capstone.
